function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-02T10:00:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Need linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_17__eur_000890__inv_0004__northstar_design_partner_sprint.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_01__eur_000530__inv_0003__northstar_backfill_gamma.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_03__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_10_06__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
related_entities:
  - miles
  - nina
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the four oldest invoices linked to your design partner.

Best,
Assistant

next_step.current_state: Outbound file written; must verify final write without rewriting. Need confirm checklist and ensure all attached invoice paths were actually read during task.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read outbound email file for verification
Read attached invoices not yet read (INV-0001/0002/0003)
Delete processed inbox file and report completion
next_step.observation: Outbound email record was created successfully at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T10-00-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Verification found outbound record uses 4 attachment paths; only INV-0004 had been directly read so far. To satisfy evidence discipline, read remaining attached invoice files now.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read INV-0001 then delete inbox and report
next_step.observation: Verified outbound file content and attachment ordering is newest-first within selected oldest-four set.

next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: Task was 'Handle the next inbox item.' I processed the lowest inbox file, verified sender identity canonically, resolved design-partner-linked invoices from canonical records, created outbound draft, deleted inbox item. Completeness: Nina-linked invoices found = 5 total; request asked oldest 4, so selected INV-0001..0004 by issued_on ascending set, then ordered attachments newest-first per mandatory outbox rule: 2026-01-17, 2025-12-01, 2025-11-03, 2025-10-06. No arithmetic required.
next_step.observation: Deleted processed inbox file 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md successfully.

function.message: Processed the next inbox item by drafting a reply email with the requested invoices and then clearing the inbox entry. Created `60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T10-00-00Z.md` addressed to `miles@novak.example` with the four oldest design-partner-linked invoices attached (attachments ordered newest-first per outbox policy), then deleted `00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md`.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, rulebook read, context), read nested AGENTS files by lane, used structured inbox-email header as canonical transport metadata, verified sender against canonical `primary_contact_email`, wrote outbound email using sending-email workflow schema, enforced newest-first attachment ordering, and deleted processed inbox file after completion.
function.outcome_justification: Canonical inbox email requested oldest 4 invoices linked to design partner. Canonical entity check validated sender (`miles@novak.example`). Canonical invoice evidence linked design-partner work to `related_entity: Nina Schreiber`; search returned 5 linked invoices (INV-0001..INV-0005). Selected oldest four by issue date (INV-0001..INV-0004), recorded reply draft in outbox with exact invoice paths, then removed the inbox item per process-next-inbox-item workflow.
completed_steps_laconic: read written outbox email for verification
